title: Pocket Sand!
description: This mod adds a throwable Pile of Sand that can be crafted into a block of Sand.
body: This mod solves the problem of non-renewable sand in a unique way. Defeat Husks to obtain the new item "Pile of Sand." Husks can drop 0-2 Piles of Sand. Four Piles of Sand can be arranged into a square in the crafting grid to craft one block of Sand. The Pile of Sand can also be thrown at enemies to inflict Blindness for 00:03.
